# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_idrac_attributes (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `idrac_attributes` (String) Dictionary of iDRAC attributes and value. The attributes should be part of the Integrated Dell Remote Access Controller Attribute Registry. To view the list of attributes in Attribute Registry for iDRAC9 and above, see, https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Managers/iDRAC.Embedded.1/Oem/Dell/DellAttributes/iDRAC.Embedded.1) and https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Registries/ManagerAttributeRegistry). For iDRAC8 based servers, derive the manager attribute name from Server Configuration Profile. If the manager attribute name in Server Configuration Profile is <GroupName>.<Instance>#<AttributeName> (for Example, 'SNMP.1#AgentCommunity') then the equivalent attribute name for Redfish is <GroupName>.<Instance>.<AttributeName> (for Example, 'SNMP.1.AgentCommunity').
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `lifecycle_controller_attributes` (String) Dictionary of Lifecycle Controller attributes and value. The attributes should be part of the Integrated Dell Remote Access Controller Attribute Registry.To view the list of attributes in Attribute Registry for iDRAC9 and above, see, https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Managers/iDRAC.Embedded.1/Oem/Dell/DellAttributes/LifecycleController.Embedded.1) and https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Registries/ManagerAttributeRegistry). For iDRAC8 based servers, derive the manager attribute name from Server Configuration Profile. If the manager attribute name in Server Configuration Profile is <GroupName>.<Instance>#<AttributeName> (for Example, 'LCAttributes.1#AutoUpdate') then the equivalent attribute name for Redfish is <GroupName>.<Instance>.<AttributeName> (for Example, 'LCAttributes.1.AutoUpdate').
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `resource_id` (String) Redfish ID of the resource.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `system_attributes` (String) Dictionary of System attributes and value. The attributes should be part of the Integrated Dell Remote Access Controller Attribute Registry. To view the list of attributes in Attribute Registry for iDRAC9 and above, see, https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Managers/iDRAC.Embedded.1/Oem/Dell/DellAttributes/System.Embedded.1) and https://I(idrac_ip/redfish/v1/Registries/ManagerAttributeRegistry). For iDRAC8 based servers, derive the manager attribute name from Server Configuration Profile. If the manager attribute name in Server Configuration Profile is <GroupName>.<Instance>#<AttributeName> (for Example, 'ThermalSettings.1#ThermalProfile') then the equivalent attribute name for Redfish is <GroupName>.<Instance>.<AttributeName> (for Example, 'ThermalSettings.1.ThermalProfile').
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Error information of the operation.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `invalid_attributes` (String) Dict of invalid attributes provided.
- `msg` (String) Status of the attribute update operation.
